build-game.template:
Use threejs-game-director to build a premium game from scratch.
Follow the director's phase OS: scaffold, implement gameplay loop, add visuals, design UI, debug, QA, and release.

$ARGUMENTS
build-game.description: Build a complete Three.js game using the game director

upgrade-graphics.template:
Use threejs-game-director to upgrade this game's visuals to premium/AAA quality.
Load threejs-aaa-graphics-builder for visual upgrade workflows, materials, post-processing, and the visual scorecard.

$ARGUMENTS
upgrade-graphics.description: Upgrade game visuals to premium/AAA quality

debug-finish.template:
Use threejs-game-director to debug and finish this game.
Load threejs-debug-profiler and threejs-qa-release for debugging, profiling, and release readiness.

$ARGUMENTS
debug-finish.description: Debug and finish a Three.js game

build-phaser-game.template:
Use phaser-game-director to build a premium 2D game from scratch.
Follow the director's phase OS: scaffold, implement gameplay loop, add 2D visuals, design UI, debug, QA, and release.

$ARGUMENTS
build-phaser-game.description: Build a complete Phaser 2D game using the game director

upgrade-phaser-graphics.template:
Use phaser-game-director to upgrade this 2D game's visuals to premium quality.
Load phaser-2d-graphics-builder for visual upgrade workflows, sprites, tilemaps, particles, and the 2D visual scorecard.

$ARGUMENTS
upgrade-phaser-graphics.description: Upgrade Phaser 2D game visuals to premium quality
